_note: draft & revise MUST stay on Opus — they emit the full dossier schema, which only compiles on Opus's structured-output grammar (Sonnet times out; see dossier.schema.json $comment). critique/chat/gather/metrics run on Sonnet to cut cost. Models that lack adaptive thinking + effort (Haiku, claude-3*) are handled gracefully by engine/src/llm.ts but cannot run the gather web-search tools.

passes._gather_note: Gather MUST stay on Opus: it runs a web-search agentic loop and needs the model to decide when to STOP searching and synthesize the pack. Sonnet (esp. with thinking off) searches endlessly and never writes — verified empty packs. Opus+adaptive-thinking produced full packs reliably.
passes._triage_note: Monitoring triage compares two packs and only flags material change — cheap and frequent, so Haiku. No web tools, small schema; thinking/effort are omitted for Haiku by llm.ts.
